text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Finally, the Arima Kinen is here! It's gonna be
totally crazy this year!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky is on a roll right now! She's my first pick
to win!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I wonder if she can do it. I just hope her
pace doesn't get thrown off!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Every eye in the crowd is focused on Sky. I hope
she's taking it well...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Gulp... Oh boy. I'm so scared right now.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yeah. I feel like she might pop up outta nowhere.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Gotta constantly keep on my toes to avoid her
blade... It's exhausting.
choice_data_list: She's not your only opponent, you know.
She's not your only opponent, you know.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yeesh, are you trying to scare me more?! Don't
be such a bully!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Guess you're right though. I can feel all the staring. Being this popular is hard.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Am not. There's no way I could be smiling under
all this pressure...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, you said I've got other major opponents.
That made me start thinking of strategies.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: And that gets me a little—actually, it gets me really excited. ♪
